flags.concern: Undo snapshots: commitData interception is too late to capture the true pre-edit state for drop flows that mutate editor state in place before calling `applyTimelineEdit`.
flags.evidence: `handleAssetDrop` mutates `current.tracks` and `current.rows` before the save hook ever runs, then commits via `applyTimelineEdit` ([/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAssetManagement.ts#L156](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAssetManagement.ts#L156) to [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAssetManagement.ts#L165](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAssetManagement.ts#L165), [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAssetManagement.ts#L237](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAssetManagement.ts#L237) to [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAssetManagement.ts#L239](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useAssetManagement.ts#L239)). External drops do the same for text drops and file drops ([/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts#L167](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts#L167) to [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts#L174](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts#L174), [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts#L194](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts#L194) to [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts#L202](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts#L202), [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts#L229](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useExternalDrop.ts#L229)). A snapshot taken in `commitData` would already include the newly pushed track/row, so undo would not faithfully restore the pre-drop state.

flags.concern: Checkpoints: semantic checkpoint plumbing does not actually reach the destructive track-management paths in this repo.

flags.concern: Undo batching: a single multi-clip track move from the keyboard would still produce one undo/save event per clip.
flags.evidence: Arrow up/down already drive bulk movement through `moveSelectedClipsToTrack` ([/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts#L49](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts#L49) to [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts#L60](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts#L60)). That helper loops planned moves and calls `moveClipToRow` once per clip ([/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts#L296](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts#L296) to [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts#L298](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts#L298)), and each `moveClipToRow` commits through `applyTimelineEdit` ([/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts#L131](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts#L131) to [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts#L136](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.ts#L136)). The plan only batches drags and 300ms rapid edits, so one keypress on a 5-clip selection would still create 5 undo entries and 5 edit-distance increments.

flags.concern: Testing: the plan only schedules manual validation even though this feature rewires the editor's core save path and the repository already uses automated tests for timeline hooks/context composition.
flags.evidence: Phase 4 is manual-only, but the repo already has Vitest coverage patterns for timeline behavior in [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts#L1](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts#L1) to [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts#L122](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineTrackManagement.test.ts#L122) and provider/context wiring in [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx#L1](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx#L1) to [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx#L58](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/contexts/VideoEditorProvider.test.tsx#L58). With `useTimelineSave` as the persistence/conflict chokepoint ([/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineSave.ts#L176](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineSave.ts#L176) to [/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineSave.ts#L218](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/hooks/useTimelineSave.ts#L218)), omitting automated coverage leaves redo invalidation, semantic checkpointing, and conflict/save interactions uncontained.
